creator: info@aballesta.es
text:
Hola Beñat,

The versions are:

lazarus-1.0.12_1    A portable Delphi-like IDE for the FreePascal compiler
lazarus-lcl-gtk2-1.0.12_1 Lazarus components library - GTK2 backend
lazarus-lcl-nogui-1.0.12_1 Lazarus components library - No gui backend
lazarus-lcl-units-1.0.12_1 Lazarus components library units

Because I installed for previous doublecmd version.


========================================
===> The following configuration options are available for lazarus-1.0.12_1:
====> Options available for the single LCL: you have to select exactly one of them
     GTK1=off: Use gtk12 interface
     GTK2=on: Use gtk20 interface
     QT4=off: Use qt4 interface
========================================

I've another bug relationed on lazarus compilation, and it can't re-install. The bug is like one marked on 04/Oct/13 by another user, the next:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=182647


El 04/12/2013 19:51, Beñat Gonzalez Etxepare escribió:
> Hi,
>
> I can't reproduce the error. LazIDEIntf unit should be installed by
> editors/lazarus port which is a build time dependency of
> x11-fm/doublecmd. Can you give me the output of the following command?
>
> pkg_info | grep lazarus
>
> ( or if you are using pkgng: )
> pkg info | grep lazarus
>
>
> Also, I would like to know the exact command you are using to upgrade the 
> ports, so I can try to reproduce the error locally.
>
